{{Quote|You should be mindful of the Rak'qua Overlord.|[[E-5KL]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SG" />}}
'''Rrynt'vor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Nautolan/Legends|Nautolan]] warrior who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Overlord Rrynt'vor was the overseer of the [[Rak'qua]], a tribe of bellicose Nautolan warriors that had taken control of [[Station Gamma]], an [[Asteroid base|asteroid-carved space station]] in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]]. Usually wearing a [[chitin armor]], he led his men from his base deep down in the asteroid station. In the deepest cave, Rrynt'vor kept his pet, a giant [[carax]] named [[Ageaughu]].<ref name="SWG:SG" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a war erupted between the Rak'qua and the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] from neighboring [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]].<ref name="SWG:SG" /> Nevertheless, [[Officer/Legends|Officer]] [[Antom Moria]] later discovered the involvement of a local arms dealer in the outbreak of the conflict and was finally able through negotiation to convince both parties that the war was meaningless.<ref name="SWG:PaW">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Officer|Preventing a War|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Rrynt'vor appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Rrynt'vor was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]]," introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> Rrynt'vor was not involved in any quest and was only briefly mentioned in few conversations.<ref name="SWG:SG" />
